page_title: List of warhorses (Attack on Titan Game)
text:
The Warhorse is the player's primary means of ground transportation in Attack on Titan and is only usable on certain maps, usually those taking place outside an inhabited district. They are rated by Speed (how fast they can go) and Stamina (how long they can run at full speed).
